words.def: a set of two similar things considered as a unit
words.zh: n. 一雙, 一對, 一副

words.def: a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of
words.zh: n. 空氣, 旋律, 態度

words.def: a dissolute man in fashionable society
words.zh: n. 裂痕, 破綻, 拉裂, 浪子, 巨浪
